# MuleSoft API Functional Monitoring

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of API Functional Monitoring documentation.
> See [API Functional Monitoring llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/llms-full.txt) for all the API Functional Monitoring documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Adding Schedules](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-add-schedule.md)
- [Creating Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-create-monitor.md)
- [Creating Private Locations](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-create-private-location.md)
- [Deleting Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-delete-monitor.md)
- [Deleting Schedules](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-delete-schedule.md)
- [Downloading Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-download-test.md)
- [Getting Started with API Functional Monitoring](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-getting-started.md)
- [API Functional Monitoring in Anypoint Monitoring](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-in-anypoint-platform.md)
- [Using Secrets to Mask Sensitive Information in Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-mask-info-in-monitors.md)
- [Modifying Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-modify-monitor.md)
- [Modifying Schedules](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-modify-schedule.md)
- [Monitoring the Endpoints of Private APIs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-monitoring-private-apis.md)
- [Monitoring the Endpoints of Public APIs](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-monitoring-public-apis.md)
- [Uploading Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-upload-monitor.md)
- [Versioning Monitors](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-version-monitors.md)
- [Viewing Schedules That Use a Private Location](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-view-schedules-private-location.md)
- [Viewing Test History](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/afm-view-test-history.md)
- [API Functional Monitoring Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/api-functional-monitoring-release-notes.md)
- [BDD Test-Writing Syntax Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-bdd-reference.md)
- [BAT CLI Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-command-reference.md)
- [Example of a Test Suite](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-example-test-suite.md)
- [Run a Test Suite](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-execute-task.md)
- [Installing BAT](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-install-task.md)
- [Writing and Running BAT Tests in IntelliJ IDEA](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-intellij-idea.md)
- [Configuring and Viewing Reports](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-reporting-task.md)
- [Creating Monitors That Use a Specific Location](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-schedule-for-particular-location.md)
- [Scheduling Testing and Monitoring](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-schedule-test-task.md)
- [Starting New Test Suites](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-start-new-project.md)
- [API Functional Monitoring with the Blackbox Automated Testing (BAT) CLI](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-top.md)
- [Getting Started Writing Tests](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/bat-write-tests-task.md)
- [API Functional Monitoring Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/api-functional-monitoring/index.md)
